data.title: Lleida.net Secures Ninth US Patent for eIDAS Notification Method

data.title: Co-founder offers reward to reclaim $42M lost in recent hack. $1.2M frozen as probe continues into seed phrase breach.
data.description: Authorities have seized approximately $1.2 million in connection to a security breach involving a compromised seed phrase. Efforts are ongoing to track the lost funds from the breached wallet.

data.title: Coinbase rejects Senate bill's stablecoin compromise, causing disruption in legislation progress.
data.description: Coinbase continues to resist stablecoin yield provisions in the Senate’s crypto market structure bill, causing a setback in advancing the legislation. This opposition has previously hindered progress on the bill, which seeks to regulate the cryptocurrency market. The platform's opposition to the provisions highlights the challenges in reaching a consensus on the regulatory framework for cryptocurrencies. This resistance comes at a critical time when the industry is facing increased scrutiny, with the bill aiming to address issues such as stablecoin regulation. The ongoing debate underscores the complexity of regulating the fast-growing cryptocurrency market and the diverging perspectives within the industry. Coinbase's stance on the issue is a significant factor in the current impasse, with both sides needing to find common ground to move forward. The bill's fate hinges on resolving these contentious issues, with the outcome expected to have a substantial impact on the cryptocurrency market and its participants.
